parameters.content:
### New Email Form Submission

Serves an n8n-hosted form (From, Subject, Receivedat). Each submission becomes one execution.

Next: Score the Lead

### Score the Lead

Custom JavaScript: Score each email 0-100 from simple heuristics

Next: Assign Round-Robin Owner

### Assign Round-Robin Owner

Custom JavaScript: Round-robin owner assignment

Next: Route by Heat

### Route by Heat

Routes each item to one of 3 lanes: hot, warm + fallback.

Ports: ①→ Hot → Google Sheets + Instant Ping · ②→ Warm → Drip via Outlook · ③→ Cold → Park in Nurture List

### Hot → Google Sheets + Instant Ping

googleSheets — `appendOrUpdate` operation against the connected account.

Next: Notify Assigned Owner

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Google OAuth2 / service account

nodes.name: Note: Hot → Google Sheets + Instant Ping

parameters.content:
### Combine Lead Paths

Rejoins 3 branches into one stream (mode: append) so downstream logic runs once.

# Log form submissions with Google Sheets and Outlook

**Pattern:** Form Intake · **Level:** Foundation · **Trigger:** Form

## What it does
Log form submissions with Google Sheets and Outlook. It starts from a hosted form submission.

## Why it exists
Manual drip campaigns is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
New Email Form Submission → Score the Lead → Assign Round-Robin Owner → Route by Heat → Hot → Google Sheets + Instant Ping → Notify Assigned Owner → Combine Lead Paths

## Use it for
- Teams that want to form intake without manual effort
- Anyone automating drip campaigns in marketing
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Removes copy-paste errors
- Keeps your systems in sync
- Responds in seconds

## Before first run
Connect credentials: Google OAuth2 / service account; Microsoft OAuth2.
Follow the color key: 🟦 entry · 🟪 AI · 🟫 actions · ⬜ utilities · 🟩 outputs · 🟥 error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath — read those before editing.

## 🛠 Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see 🔑 lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your drip campaigns process. Every node card explains its role — safe to extend at any marked branch.
